items.detail: 1465 total units in mission (threshold: 1200). Even late-activated units consume memory.
786 trigger zones (threshold: 90). Zones used in triggers are evaluated every frame.
CTLD detected in mission scripts. checkHoverStatus and checkAIStatus poll every 1–2s over all registered transport pilots — a steady CPU cost at scale.
